name: London Wellness Co.
description: London Wellness Co. is a boutique lifestyle brand and retailer offering organic skincare, health supplements, and yoga apparel with 5 locations in London and a thriving online shop.

name: Albion Home & Garden
description: Albion Home & Garden operates large garden centers and home furnishings depots across the United Kingdom, focusing on sustainable outdoor furniture, indoor plants, and artisan homeware.
